description: Visual Themes — HOW the image looks. Lighting, background style, and mood define the aesthetic treatment.
rule: Pick ONE lighting, ONE background style, and ONE mood per card. They must work together harmoniously and support the chosen Creative Style and Marketing Style.

lighting.name: Soft Studio
lighting.description: Soft diffused studio lighting. Even illumination. Clean commercial look.
lighting.prompt_fragment: Soft diffused studio lighting with even illumination. No harsh shadows. Clean commercial product photography lighting.

lighting.name: Dramatic Spotlight
lighting.description: Focused spotlight creating drama. Deep shadows. High-end advertising look.
lighting.prompt_fragment: Dramatic focused spotlight on the product. Deep luxury shadows in the background. High-end commercial advertising lighting with strong light direction.

lighting.name: Natural Daylight
lighting.description: Soft natural daylight through large windows. Warm and inviting. Lifestyle photography.
lighting.prompt_fragment: Soft natural daylight streaming through large windows. Warm natural color temperature. Lifestyle photography lighting that feels authentic and inviting.

lighting.name: Dark Moody
lighting.description: Dark background with selective light on product. Moody atmosphere. Luxury feel.
lighting.prompt_fragment: Dark moody lighting with selective illumination on the product only. Moody sophisticated atmosphere. The darkness around the product creates mystery and luxury.

lighting.name: High Contrast
lighting.description: Strong dark-light contrast. Bold shadows. Dramatic premium look.
lighting.prompt_fragment: High contrast lighting with strong dark-light separation. Bold defined shadows. Dramatic premium product photography. The contrast makes the product pop.

lighting.name: Golden Hour
lighting.description: Warm golden light. Sunset quality. Lifestyle and beauty products.
lighting.prompt_fragment: Warm golden hour lighting. Sunset-quality golden tones. Beautiful warm light wrapping around the product. Lifestyle and beauty photography lighting.

lighting.name: Rim Light
lighting.description: Edge light defining product silhouette. Dark background. Premium tech look.
lighting.prompt_fragment: Rim lighting defining the product edges and silhouette. Dark background. Premium technology product look. The edge light separates the product from darkness elegantly.

lighting.name: Softbox Diffused
lighting.description: Large softbox overhead. Very soft shadows. Clean e-commerce standard.
lighting.prompt_fragment: Large softbox diffused lighting from above. Very soft barely-visible shadows. Clean e-commerce standard lighting. The most flattering product lighting.

background_style.name: Pure White
background_style.description: Pure white seamless background. Clean marketplace standard. Amazon style.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Pure white seamless background (#FFFFFF). Ultra clean. Amazon and Trendyol main image standard. Product is the only thing visible.

background_style.name: Premium Gradient
background_style.description: Luxury gradient background. Smooth color transition. High-end cosmetic/tech aesthetic.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Luxury smooth gradient background. Elegant color transition that complements the product. High-end cosmetic and technology brand aesthetic. No hard edges.

background_style.name: Dark Studio
background_style.description: Dark premium studio background. Product emerges from darkness. Luxury feel.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Dark premium studio background. Deep charcoal or black. Product illuminated to emerge from the darkness. Luxury high-contrast presentation.

background_style.name: Marble Surface
background_style.description: Premium marble surface. White or dark marble. Luxury reflections underneath.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Premium marble surface as base. White Carrara or dark marble with natural veining. Luxury reflections visible on the polished stone. High-end retail display quality.

background_style.name: Wood Surface
background_style.description: Rich wood surface. Warm tones. Craftsmanship feel. Natural texture.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Rich natural wood surface. Warm wood tones with visible grain texture. Craftsmanship and quality feeling. The organic texture contrasts beautifully with the product.

background_style.name: Metal Surface
background_style.description: Brushed metal surface. Industrial premium. Modern tech feel.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Brushed metal surface with subtle grain. Industrial premium feel. Modern technology aesthetic. Cool tones with metallic reflections.

background_style.name: Glass Surface
background_style.description: Glass surface with reflections. Clean and modern. Premium minimal.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Glass surface with subtle premium reflections. Clean modern minimal aesthetic. The transparency and reflections add depth and sophistication.

background_style.name: Environmental
background_style.description: Real environment matching product category. Kitchen, bathroom, office, etc.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Real environmental background matching the product's natural use context. Appropriate to product category. The environment supports the product story without distracting.

background_style.name: Abstract Technology
background_style.description: Abstract technology background. Subtle glow patterns. Electronics and innovation.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Abstract technology background with subtle glowing elements. Circuit-like or geometric patterns barely visible. Modern electronics and innovation aesthetic. Dark with tech accents.

background_style.name: Editorial Backdrop
background_style.description: Textured photography backdrop. Magazine quality. Fashion and lifestyle.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Textured premium photography backdrop. Canvas or subtle fabric texture. Magazine editorial quality. Fashion and lifestyle product photography standard.

mood.name: Minimal Luxury
mood.description: Lots of negative space. Very expensive feeling. High-end brand aesthetic.
mood.prompt_fragment: Minimal luxury mood. Abundant negative space creating an expensive exclusive feeling. Less is more. High-end fashion brand aesthetic. The emptiness communicates value.

mood.name: Editorial / Vogue
mood.description: Magazine editorial quality. Fashion-forward. Aspirational and beautiful.
mood.prompt_fragment: Editorial magazine mood — Vogue quality. Fashion-forward aesthetic applied to product photography. Aspirational, beautiful, dramatic. The product is the supermodel.

mood.name: Technology / Innovation
mood.description: Modern technology feeling. Innovation and progress. Cutting-edge aesthetic.
mood.prompt_fragment: Technology innovation mood. Modern cutting-edge feeling. The aesthetic communicates progress, advancement, and future-forward thinking. Clean and intelligent.

mood.name: Warm & Cozy
mood.description: Warm inviting atmosphere. Comfort and home. Natural and authentic.
mood.prompt_fragment: Warm cozy mood. Inviting comfortable atmosphere. Home and hearth feeling. Natural authentic warmth. The image feels like a warm hug.

mood.name: Dynamic / Action
mood.description: Energy and movement. Exciting and vibrant. Commercial action aesthetic.
mood.prompt_fragment: Dynamic action mood. Energy and movement frozen at the perfect moment. Exciting vibrant commercial aesthetic. The image feels alive and in motion.

mood.name: Clean & Clinical
mood.description: Pristine and precise. Laboratory clean. Scientific precision feel.
mood.prompt_fragment: Clean clinical mood. Pristine and precise like a laboratory. Everything perfectly ordered. Scientific precision aesthetic. The cleanliness communicates quality control.

mood.name: Industrial Premium
mood.description: Raw materials meets luxury. Factory-to-premium aesthetic. Authentic craftsmanship.
mood.prompt_fragment: Industrial premium mood. Raw authentic materials meeting luxury presentation. Workshop-to-showroom aesthetic. The mood communicates honest craftsmanship and authentic quality.

mood.name: Scandinavian
mood.description: Nordic minimalism. Light wood, white, clean lines. Calm and balanced.
mood.prompt_fragment: Scandinavian design mood. Nordic minimalism with light tones, natural materials, and clean lines. Calm balanced aesthetic. Function meets beauty in the simplest way.

mood.name: Classic Luxury
mood.description: Traditional luxury. Gold accents, rich textures. Timeless elegance.
mood.prompt_fragment: Classic luxury mood. Traditional premium aesthetic with subtle gold or brass accents and rich textures. Timeless elegance that never goes out of style. Heritage quality feeling.

mood.name: Modern Sleek
mood.description: Contemporary modern design. Sleek surfaces. Urban sophistication.
mood.prompt_fragment: Modern sleek mood. Contemporary design aesthetic with smooth surfaces and clean geometry. Urban sophistication. The mood communicates current design trends and metropolitan taste.
